title: GitHub Starred Repo Sync to Wiki
description: Automatically download GitHub repositories I star from OTHER people (not my own), clone them locally, and maintain an indexed catalog in my wiki inbox folder.
problem: Starred repos from others don't sync to local machine. No centralized index in wiki. Manual clone process. Lose track of why I starred something.
solution: Background service that monitors GitHub for new starred repos from OTHER users (filters out my own repos), auto-clones to ~/wiki/inbox/repos/, generates wiki index
features: GitHub API integration (poll starred repos endpoint)
Filter: EXCLUDE my own repos, only download others' repos I star
successCriteria: New starred repos appear in wiki inbox within 1 hour
My own repos are NEVER downloaded (only starred repos from others)
Searchable by language, tags, description, why starred
